descriptions: Added resizable minimap — drag-to-resize directly in Edit Mode.
Added Config.DefaultSettings.minimap.size for the server default size, and maxSize for the player drag ceiling (default 125%).
Fixed server logo flash — the giant/mispositioned logo appearing when spamming the pause menu.
Fixed minimap detaching from its edit box when enlarged — resolved the drag-vs-radar scale mismatch.
Player blip and all other blips are now hidden while in Edit Mode for a cleaner view when dragging components.
